title: Dark Delusion
writer: Jack Andrews, Harry Ruskin, Max Brand
actors: Lionel Barrymore, James Craig, Lucille Bremer
plot: Dr. Leonard Gillespie, for several reasons and not all medically related, asks a young surgeon, Dr. Tommy Coalt, to go to a small town and replace a local doctor while he is on vacation. There, Coalt is asked to sign commitment pa...
